title: I Can't Give You Anything But Love, Baby
writer: James Edward Grant, Arthur T. Horman, Paul Gerard Smith
actors: Broderick Crawford, Jessie Ralph, Johnny Downs
plot: When Public Enemy No. 3 Sonny McGann meets composer Bob Gunther, he gets the idea of having Bob write music to a poem he has written about his long-lost sweetheart Sadie McGlonsky. Somewhere between kidnapping and gentle persuasio...
